description: Style Note This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion. Product Details White and beige Potli-style purse with silver detail and a drawstring closure Padded silk upper Beads on the drawstrings Material and Care Silk Size Length: 18 cm Width: 16 cm
